paper_title: SuperGLUE: A Stickier Benchmark for General-Purpose Language Understanding Systems
evaluation_method: SuperGLUE benchmark evaluated via log-likelihood scoring in the lm-evaluation-harness. Contains eight NLU tasks: BoolQ (accuracy), CB (accuracy and macro-F1), COPA (accuracy), MultiRC (F1 and exact match), ReCoRD (F1 and exact match), RTE (accuracy), WiC (accuracy), WSC (accuracy). In the log-likelihood evaluation setting, the model scores candidate completions by their log-probability and selects the highest-scoring one. The overall SuperGLUE score is the simple average across all tasks.
metric: task-dependent (accuracy, F1, exact match); overall is average across tasks
